ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the season (e.g., active, upcoming, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the season */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines for the season */,
  "banner_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the season's banner image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the level belongs to */,
  "level_number" INTEGER /* Level number (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "level_point" INTEGER /* Points required to complete the level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the level */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the level */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for completing the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the reward belongs to */,
  "normal_reward" TEXT /* Normal reward for completing the level */,
  "premium_reward" TEXT /* Premium reward for completing the level */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., in-game items, currency, experience points) */,
  "reward_value" TEXT /* Value of the reward */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency associated with the reward */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language associated with the reward description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the player's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's preferred language */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's preferred currency */,
  "premium_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player has a premium account */,
  "premium_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the premium account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level the player has progressed to */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the player progressed to the level */,
  "current_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player */,
  "last_progress_date" TEXT /* Date of the player's last progress update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "reward_claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward claim */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward claimed */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was claimed */,
  "reward_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward (e.g., claimed, pending, expired) */,
  "reward_value_used" TEXT /* Value of the reward that has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode (e.g., Single-Player, Multiplayer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game mode */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and guidelines for the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the game mode was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Player's score in the game mode */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Player's rank in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id", "player_id", "play_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol (e.g., $, €, ¥) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate relative to a base currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., English, Spanish, French) */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale code (e.g., en-US, es-ES) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., login, level completion, reward claim) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode associated with the event */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the level associated with the event */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward associated with the event */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season associated with the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("level_id") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)
